sections.title: Carry-Over
items: FIX IMMEDIATELY (BUILD BROKEN): Remove 'use client' OR move metadata to layout.tsx in 3 files: src/app/tools/token-radar/page.tsx, src/app/tools/risk-score/page.tsx, src/app/whale-watch/page.tsx — same pattern fixed in multiple prior sprints

CRITICAL: Add checkRateLimit() to all 6 public API routes (/api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields) — rate-limiter.ts is built and wired only to /api/health; carry-over since Day 13
CRITICAL: Add FALLBACK_DATA to /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/defi-yields — currently return 502 on external API failure with no graceful degradation
DEPLOY (after build fix): Ecosystem pages (78 dApp routes) + courses routes are committed at 1b4a15e but NOT live — blocked by build failure
PUBLISH (after build fix): Promote genius-act-stablecoin-guide + best-meme-coin-launchpads-2026 from PUBLISH_QUEUE to PUBLISHED_PAGES
SEO GAP: /ecosystem/[dApp] pages use 'use client' with no per-page generateMetadata — depend on parent layout.tsx title only; needs per-dApp metadata
FIX (non-blocking): AICourseRecommendations.tsx — ~17 pre-existing JSX/TS errors; structured-data.examples.ts — 8 JSX syntax errors; both non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors:true
AUDIT: 100/282 published slugs have no page.tsx — triage needed to confirm planned pipeline vs genuine gaps
[Jefe] Add payment method to Vercel Pro — trial expires ~10 days: vercel.com/account/billing
[Jefe] Set NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID in Vercel environment variables
[Jefe] Configure GitHub Actions secrets to unblock Playwright CI
NEXT SPRINT: DeFiLlama Live API (Bloomberg Screener V3 real data), Email Drip via Resend, Referral Backend
